mapper.sql: is_deleted = FALSE AND is_in_context = TRUE AND ( (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{aiCharacterId}) OR (sender_id = #{aiCharacterId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, #{userId} AS user_id, #{aiCharacterId} AS ai_character_id, CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN 'USER' ELSE 'AI' END AS sender_type, content, created_at FROM message WHERE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM message WHERE AND id > #{startMessageId}

SELECT id, #{userId} AS user_id, #{aiCharacterId} AS ai_character_id, CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN 'USER' ELSE 'AI' END AS sender_type, content, created_at FROM message WHERE AND (#{startMessageId} IS NULL OR id > #{startMessageId}) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
